title: Kasi Viswanathar Temple, Kumbakonam

heroImage.alt: Kasi Viswanathar Temple, Kumbakonam, Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Kasi Viswanathar Temple, Kumbakonam is a Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Shiva, located in Kumbakonam, Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Kasi Viswanathar Temple, Kumbakonam is a Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Shiva, located in Kumbakonam, Tamil Nadu, India. Here, Lord Shiva is worshipped as Kasi Viswanathar, and His consort Parvati is depicted as Visalakshi. The presiding deity is revered in the 7th-century Tamil Saiva canonical work, the Tevaram, written by Tamil saint poets known as the nayanars and classified as Paadal Petra Sthalam. The temple complex covers two acres and is located close to the Mahamaham tank.

topPlaces.name: Kodeeswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Kodeeswarar Temple (Tamil: : கொட்டையூர் கோடீஸ்வரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Shiva, located in Kottaiyur, a village on the western outskirts of Kumbakonam, in Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India. Shiva is worshipped as Koteeswarar and His consort Parvathi as Pandhadu Nayaki.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kasi Viswanathar Temple, Kumbakonam?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kasi Viswanathar Temple, Kumbakonam is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kasi Viswanathar Temple, Kumbakonam?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (76 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (77 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kasi Viswanathar Temple, Kumbakonam?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kasi Viswanathar Temple, Kumbakonam at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kasi Viswanathar Temple, Kumbakonam?
faq.a: Stays in Kasi Viswanathar Temple, Kumbakonam start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kasi Viswanathar Temple, Kumbakonam?
faq.a: The top attractions are Perumandi, Kodeeswarar Temple, Kalahasteeswarar Temple, Chakrapani Temple, Valaiyapettai.
